recommendations.title: Night of the Living Deb
recommendations.overview: After a one night stand Deb wakes up in the middle of a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: High School of the Dead: Drifters of the Dead
recommendations.overview: In their efforts to find a safe haven from the zombie apocalypse, the gang find themselves on a deserted island. Now, they take advantage of the momentary respite to enjoy some surf, sand and bathing suits!

recommendations.title: Zoo
recommendations.overview: A couple trying to save their marriage during a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Cockneys vs Zombies
recommendations.overview: A group of Cockneys arm themselves to rescue their elderly relative and his retirement home friends who are trapped and fighting off a zombie attack during a zombie apocalypse in the East End of London.

recommendations.title: Anna and the Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: A zombie apocalypse threatens the sleepy town of Little Haven—at Christmas—forcing Anna and her friends to fight, slash, and sing their way to survival. In a desperate race to reach their loved ones, they soon learn that no one is safe in this new wo

recommendations.title: Watership Down
recommendations.overview: When the warren belonging to a community of rabbits is threatened, a brave group led by Fiver, Bigwig, Blackberry and Hazel leave their homeland in a search of a safe new haven.

recommendations.title: The Cured
recommendations.overview: What happens when the undead return to life? In a world ravaged for years by a virus that turns the infected into zombie-like cannibals, a cure is at last found and the wrenching process of reintegrating the survivors back into society begins.

recommendations.title: The Revenant
recommendations.overview: A horror movie/buddy comedy about Joey and his undead friend Bart who comes back from the dead as a revenant: an articulate zombie that needs to drink blood to arrest the decomposition of his body.

recommendations.title: Zombie Apocalypse
recommendations.genres: Action, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Months after a zombie plague has wiped out 90 percent of the American population, a small group of survivors fight their way cross-country to a rumored refuge on the island of Catalina.

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of survivors take refuge in a shopping mall after the world is taken over by aggressive, flesh-eating zombies.
